title: Reimagined Intro
description: Replaces Minecraft's intro with a new Mojang animation and the official Minecraft channel outro!
body:
|![Reimagined Intro](https://i.imgur.com/9qBZ8XK.png)|
|:-:|
|This mod reimagines the iconic title screen with a stunning Mojang animation straight from Minecraft Dungeons. To make the experience even more immersive, it seamlessly incorporates the official Minecraft YouTube outro you already know and love—bringing a fresh, modern, and cinematic touch to your startup. Perfect for players who want a fresh and modern way to launch their adventure. ✨|

## ![Gallery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/833ebbaa71a01267166b2bc69e13a60a6106b36f.png)

![Mojang Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7847152e09bd059ba341fb4645db2a2d502e9184.webp)
